rankings.reason: Best structure; it provides a clear, actionable step-by-step guide tailored to the influencer persona and airport experience.
Good logical flow, but it focuses on arrival/departure logistics rather than the specific airport navigation requested.
Lacks a structured step-by-step guide, offering only general advice instead of the requested navigation process.
Incorrectly describes the arrival process (post-flight) instead of the departure process required for the guide.
